def negative_python_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_raise_from_none_hides_retriable_error_context():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_raise_from_none_hides_retriable_error_context"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag error translation that drops cause context needed to avoid repeated failed retries."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
